name: BootstrapSpark
introduction: BootstrapSpark is an elegant, high-performance single-page application (SPA) built with React and Bootstrap that showcases dynamic frontend patterns powered by robust APIs from the WebSpark ecosystem.
about: This app serves as both a demonstration and a reference implementation for modern React development practices. BootstrapSpark consumes data and services from existing APIs and showcases dynamic routing, client-side state management, and interactive Bootstrap-based UI patterns.
